description_long: This is a modern, geometric wooden shelving unit composed of two interlocking rectangular frames, each with open sides and a flat top and bottom. The structure is made from light-colored wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a natural and contemporary appearance. The front view reveals a unique stepped design, with one frame offset vertically and horizontally from the other, creating multiple open compartments for storage or display. The back view shows a solid panel in the central section, likely providing additional support and a backdrop for the shelves. The sides are solid, emphasizing the thickness and quality of the wood used. This piece is suitable for use as a display shelf, room divider, or accent furniture in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or modern homes.
description: A modern, interlocking wooden shelving unit with open compartments and a stepped, geometric design. The light wood finish and visible grain give it a contemporary, natural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stepped, interlocking rectangular frames and open shelving compartments.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat wooden panel and the thickness of the material.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid central panel and the geometric arrangement of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid wood panel and the offset structure.
